items.title: Sprint Demo Feedback (Sprint 1,2,3,4)
items.description:
*Demo feedback -*

* sub brand - change to - Brand extensions and add values as provide by client
* check PMG to brand association
* change logo to blue circle logo
* PMG and SAG description should be displayed for specific verticals, also codes
* for new SAG - it will get created in masters along with association with PMG, Brand, sub brand
* Sarvanesh will share new template for ERP team, after that we need to implement the same
* we need to check for main product  after SKU creation - other tabs should be disabled except DAM/SCM/SEO
* We need to check for ERP excel - user should be able to open excel file with fetched all data, add item codes and submit. User should not enter/edit other details
* we need to check if we can differentiate between new product and existing products - some color indication
* Vaishali to check that for change workflow - product manager / product developer should be able select actions. it should be available for both
* Emails to be sent to ERP support while approving the product only and no need to schedule the job run
* Performance ratings need to be changed - 1,2,3,4,5

items.title: Manage Master Data for all Masters
items.description:
*User Story Title –* Manage Master Data for all Masters

*User Persona:* Admin/IT Manager, Product Manager, Product Developer, Marketing Manager, Legal Team, Product Head, Marketing Head, DAM Manager, ERP Support Team

*User Story Description –* As a user, I should be able to manage all masters so that I can Add/View/Update/Delete Master data into the Pimcore system.



*Acceptance Criteria:*

* Admin/IT Manager can add/view/update/delete any master data value by clicking on Masters. 
* Only Admin/IT Manager should be able to add new Masters

*List of Masters:*

|Manufacturing Type|
|Vertical|
|PMG|
|SAG|
|Brand|
|Sub Brand |



* Admin/IT Manager, Product Manager and Product Developer should be able to update the Master data and the changed master data should get updated in the associated products information as well
* Product Manager and Product Developer should be able to view and update only the role and PMG wise master details
* Only Admin/IT Manager and Product Manager should be able to view and delete the Master data
* All other user roles like Marketing Manager, Legal Team, Product Head, Marketing Head, DAM Manager and ERP support Team should be able to only view the master data
* Product Head should be able to view role and PMG wise master data like PMG, SAG, Brand, SubBrand for the specific permissions for Retail and Industrial
* Each Master will have fields to enter Name and code (unique ID)
* Admin/IT Manager, Product Manager, Product Developer should be able to upload Images and logos for specific masters by clicking ‘Upload’ option 
* Admin/IT Manager, Product Manager, and Product Developer should be able to add logo in Brands and Sub Brands along with its titles
* There should be provision for all Users to view, search and filter against all masters in the grid



*Please refer below mentioned screenshot for more details in Role wise no. of users -*

|*No of Users*|*Roles*|
|1|Admin|
|15|Product Manager|
|15|Product Developer|
|1|Marketing Manager|
|1
